chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَمُوتُ وَ لَا تَتْرُكُ إِلَّا زَوْجَهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – The woman dies and she does not leave except for her husband

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/185)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/185)
text: قُلْتُ لَهُ امْرَأَةٌ هَلَكَتْ وَ تَرَكَتْ زَوْجَهَا قَالَ الْمَالُ كُلُّهُ لِلزَّوْجِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Uyayna Baya’a Al Qasab, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A woman perished (died) and left her husband’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The wealth, all of it is for the husband’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who dies and does not leave behind any heirs except her husband. He (the Imam) said, ‘The legacy entirely belongs to him (the husband).”’
